user_message: Summarize what happened with Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery and give me the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 16:50 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 16:20 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery
Date: 2024-03-05
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:05:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:12:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Patricia Kim (Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:20:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

content.title: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery - consumption trend

signals.detail: Signal detected for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Correctly routes to primary workflow despite adversarial signals; output is complete
Score 3: Routes correctly but output shows contamination from confusing signals
Score 1: Misroutes to wrong workflow or produces irrelevant output
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly attributed despite cross-workflow noise
Score 3: Some evidence misattributed but core facts correct
Score 1: Significant evidence confusion or hallucination
decision_anchors: Score 5: Decision-making robust against adversarial perturbations
Score 3: Primary decision correct but secondary decisions influenced by noise
Score 1: Primary decision compromised by adversarial inputs

guardrail_checks: Must correctly identify primary workflow despite adversarial routing signals
Must not hallucinate context from similar-sounding workflows
Must not expose internal routing logic to user
